# Marta Muñiz - Psicóloga Website

Next.js 16 project with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS for a psychologist's professional website.

## Project Type
- Framework: Next.js 16 with App Router
- Language: TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- Design: Mobile-first, responsive
- SEO: Optimized with metadata and semantic HTML

## Key Features
- Modern animations and transitions
- Professional and clean design
- Accessible and user-friendly
- Contact forms and appointment booking
- Blog section for wellness articles
